question: Who was Kathlen Romeu and what happened to her in June 2021?
ground_truth: Kathlen Romeu was a 24-year-old Afro-Brazilian influencer and interior designer who was killed by a stray bullet during a police shootout in Lins de Vasconcelos, Brazil, in June 2021. She was pregnant at the time, and her unborn child also died.
event_desc: Protests break out in Lins de Vasconcelos after Afro-Brazilian influencer Kathlen Romeu is killed by a stray bullet in a police shootout.
